blockers.description: 8 manual tests (M1-M8) require live browser session with WEATHER_API_KEY
blockers.workaround: Run npm run dev with .env.local containing WEATHER_API_KEY, or deploy to Railway first

human_actions_pending.context: Static audit 26/26 pass. M1-M8 require real API key and browser (persistence, retry flow, responsive grid, background, 10-city guard, bad localStorage, X remove)

human_actions_pending.context: railway.json present with NIXPACKS + npm run start. Repo at https://github.com/kamijousproject/Frontire-AI-Coding-Group3

decisions.rationale: @import tailwindcss in globals.css, auto content detection

decisions.decision: API key process.env.WEATHER_API_KEY only, no NEXT_PUBLIC_
decisions.rationale: Server-side only, never expose to client bundle

decisions.decision: Promise.allSettled for /weather/multiple — always 200 with partial success
decisions.rationale: Resilient — one bad city doesn't fail all

decisions.decision: retryExhausted marked on first retry call, not result
decisions.rationale: Simplest approach — guarantees 1 retry max regardless of race conditions

decisions.decision: Global hook commands fixed: & node.exe syntax → node
decisions.rationale: Claude Code runs hooks via bash; PowerShell & operator caused syntax error blocking all Write/Edit operations

next_action: Run manual tests M1-M8 against npm run dev (requires .env.local with WEATHER_API_KEY), then deploy to Railway
context_notes: Phase 01 fully implemented and shipped to GitHub (origin/main). Build clean, TypeScript clean, 26/26 static must_have truths verified. All 3 plans complete. The only gap is runtime validation via browser. No code changes needed unless M1-M8 reveal bugs.
